resources.string: Open the address above in a computer browser, enter the PIN, and download the zip.\nThis page will advance automatically when the download finishes.
Open the address above in a computer browser to download the zip.\nThis page will advance automatically when the download finishes.
The browser is downloading the zip…
The zip is in your computer’s Downloads folder. Keep the local copies, or delete them after checking the zip.
The zip is in your computer’s Downloads folder. You can restore it later from Import in Settings.

plurals.name: exporting_delete_message
plurals.item: This will permanently delete %1$d session and all its files. First confirm that the zip is stored safely on your PC.
This will permanently delete %1$d sessions and all their files. First confirm that the zip is stored safely on your PC.

resources.string: Choose where to save the ZIP archive
Download in a browser over the same Wi-Fi
Couldn\'t write to the selected location
